title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.430 - Employees, council to provide for
text:
236.430.  Employees, council to provide for. — The council shall retain, employ, provide for and compensate within appropriations available therefor, such consultants, assistants, and other employees on a full- or part-time basis as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of sections 236.400 to 236.500 and prescribe the times at which they shall be appointed and their powers and duties.
(L. 1979 H.B. 603 § 7)
